rawIntent: verify-prompt-sections: add a price-formatter utility under src/shared/utils/price-format with formatPrice(cents: number): string

successCriteria.description: The price-formatter utility is implemented and can format cents to a string representation correctly.

constraints: Every state-changing operation produces an audit record.
RBAC enforced at middleware, never inline.
Input validated at the API boundary.
outOfScope: Changes to existing utilities outside of the price-formatter.
Integration with other modules or services.
